narrative:
Bev / Waterford (precinct in Washington County) has 1,159 registered voters, with 48.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.7 percentage points.
